vllm.title: [Doc] Add `QVQ` and `QwQ` to the list of supported models
vllm.author: ywang96
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
It's not super clear that these models are already supported on vLLM since the model name doesn't indicate their architecture, so we might want to just list them specifically on our doc.
Verified these two models work on H100 with
vllm serve Qwen/QVQ-72B-Preview -tp 4

and
vllm serve Qwen/QwQ-32B-Pr

vllm.title: [V1] Adding min tokens/repetition/presence/frequence penalties to V1 sampler
vllm.author: sroy745
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
In this PR we add the logic to support min_tokens, repetition penalty, presence penalty, frequency penalty aware sampling for V1. We make the following changes in the pr

Add logic in v1/sample/sampler.py and v1/sample/metadata.py to handle the new sampling parameters.
Added tests in tests/v1/sample

vllm.title: [Model]  Modify MolmoForCausalLM MLP
vllm.author: jeejeelee
vllm.bodyExcerpt: The current MolmoForCausalLM  uses the same MLP  for both image_projector and LLM, but they have different  weights forms, which creates ambiguity and makes it difficult to support BNB and LoRA.

vllm.author: robertgshaw2-redhat

SUMMARY

Splitting #11237 into separate PRs
Remove proxy by default

Performance

launch:

VLLM_USE_V1=1 vllm serve meta-llama/Meta-Llama-3.1-8B-Instruct --disable-log-requests --no-enable-prefix-caching --max-num-batched-tokens 8192

benchmark:

python3 benchmark_serving.py --model $MODEL --dataset

vllm.title: [V1] Use FlashInfer Sampling Kernel for Top-P & Top-K Sampling
vllm.author: WoosukKwon
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR brings FlashInfer's top-p & top-k sampling kernel to the V1 sampler.
The PyTorch-native implementation of top-p and top-k sampling requires sorting the entire logits tensor, which could be very large when the batch size is large. As a result, the sorting op can take ~20% performance overhead

vllm.title: [V1][3/N] API Server: Reduce Task Switching + Handle Abort Properly
vllm.author: robertgshaw2-redhat
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
SUMMARY:

Splitting #11237 into separate PRs
improve performance at high qps by reducing task switching in the api server
support aborting properly (post joe's refactor to cancellation handling)

PERFORMANCE:

server:

VLLM_USE_V1=1 vllm serve meta-llama/Meta-Llama-3.1-8B-Instruct --disable-log-requ
